serverInfo.name: Enes Efe Tokta Portfolio
serverInfo.description: Portfolio website of Enes Efe Tokta — Unity & .NET Developer. Provides structured access to portfolio data including projects, blog posts, CV, and contact information.

tools.name: get_portfolio_info
tools.description: Returns structured information about Enes Efe Tokta including skills, experience, and contact details.

tools.name: get_projects
tools.description: Returns a list of software and game development projects by Enes Efe Tokta.

tools.name: get_blog_posts
tools.description: Returns a list of blog posts published by Enes Efe Tokta on Medium.

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.description: Returns contact information and social media links for Enes Efe Tokta.

resources.name: sitemap
